question: Which of the following best defines educational purpose?

options.text: An organization conducting a flight demonstration with its UA to its prospective customers.
Students flying their personal UA in a school's compound.
Any lecture, tutorial, seminar, demonstration, class or similar activity on UA provided by an educational institution as defined in section 72 of the Private Education Act (Cap. 247A).

classification_notes: Permits, registration, and UAPL rules are being tested.
